label: Puns Only
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Use ONLY clever puns and wordplay. No roasts or stories.

label: Savage Roasts
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Focus EXCLUSIVELY on brutal personal roasts. Be vicious.

label: Wordplay
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Double meanings, homophones, clever twists ONLY.

label: Dark Humor
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Taboo, death, tragedy themes. Make it morbidly funny.

label: Insult Comic
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Direct audience/customer insults. Rude and offensive.

label: Dad Jokes
prompt: \nCRITICAL: Corny puns, knock-knocks, groaners ONLY. Be uncool.
